features.leadership_state: first directional z>=1.5 crossing in frozen lookback
features.perp_r_15m: log close ratio across four consecutive observed PF trade intervals
features.perp_z_15m: return divided by prior-30-UTC-day sample std; min 2000
features.spot_r_15m: log close ratio across four consecutive observed spot intervals
features.spot_z_15m: return divided by prior-30-UTC-day sample std; min 2000
features.volume_surprise: 15m close-based USD-volume proxy / prior-30-day median; diagnostic
